recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: The Chorus
recommendations.overview: In 1940s France, a new teacher at a school for disruptive boys gives hope and inspiration.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
recommendations.overview: A struggling musician becomes a 12-year-old musical prodigy's guardian for a summer.

recommendations.title: The English Teacher
recommendations.overview: Small-town Pennsylvania schoolteacher Linda Sinclair balances her staid home life with an incredible passion for her subject. Then a former star pupil reenters her life after failing as a playwright in New York City. Seeing in his script the inspirat

recommendations.title: The Last Five Years
recommendations.overview: In New York, a struggling actress and a successful writer sing about their failed marriage from two perspectives.

recommendations.title: The Fabulous Baker Boys
recommendations.overview: The lives of two struggling musicians, who happen to be brothers, inevitably change when they team up with a beautiful, up-and-coming singer.

recommendations.title: Canvas
recommendations.overview: After a heartbreaking loss, a grandfather struggling to reclaim his passion for painting finds the inspiration to create again.

recommendations.title: Breakin'
recommendations.overview: A struggling young dancer joins forces with two breakdancers and together they become a street sensation.

recommendations.title: The Visitor
recommendations.overview: A college professor travels to New York City to attend a conference and finds a young couple living in his apartment.
